languages.text: "И сейчас вы попросите меня выяснить, что стало с пропавшим подкреплением".
languages.translation_comment:
Есть Obj1_WhereIsGaprak стартанувший или закомпличеный
Стартуем DL_LariaAskToFindGaprak

traits.locale_text: "И сейчас вы попросите меня выяснить, что стало с пропавшим подкреплением".

languages.translation_comment:
Есть Obj1_WhereIsGaprak стартанувший или закомпличеный
Стартуем DL_LariaAskToFindGaprak

languages.text: "And now you're going to ask me to find out what has become of the missing reinforcements."
languages.original_text: "И сейчас вы попросите меня выяснить, что стало с пропавшим подкреплением".

traits.locale_text: "And now you're going to ask me to find out what has become of the missing reinforcements."
"And now you're going to ask me to find out what has become of the missing reinforcements."
"And now you're going to ask me to find out what has become of the missing reinforcements."

languages.text: “而接下来，你就要让我去查清那些失踪援军的下落了。”
languages.original_text: "And now you're going to ask me to find out what has become of the missing reinforcements."

traits.locale_text: “而接下来，你就要让我去查清那些失踪援军的下落了。”

languages.text: « Et maintenant, vous allez me demander de découvrir ce que sont devenus les renforts disparus. »
languages.original_text: "And now you're going to ask me to find out what has become of the missing reinforcements."

traits.locale_text: « Et maintenant, vous allez me demander de découvrir ce que sont devenus les renforts disparus. »

languages.text: "Şimdi de benden kayıp takviyelerin başına ne geldiğini öğrenmemi isteyeceksin."
languages.original_text: "And now you're going to ask me to find out what has become of the missing reinforcements."

traits.locale_text: "Şimdi de benden kayıp takviyelerin başına ne geldiğini öğrenmemi isteyeceksin."

languages.text: «Y ahora me pedirá que descubra qué ha sido de los refuerzos perdidos».
languages.original_text: "And now you're going to ask me to find out what has become of the missing reinforcements."

traits.locale_text: «Y ahora me pedirá que descubra qué ha sido de los refuerzos perdidos».

languages.text: "Und jetzt werdet Ihr mich bitten, herauszufinden, was aus der verschwundenen Verstärkung geworden ist."
languages.original_text: "And now you're going to ask me to find out what has become of the missing reinforcements."

traits.locale_text: "Und jetzt werdet Ihr mich bitten, herauszufinden, was aus der verschwundenen Verstärkung geworden ist."

languages.text: 「そして今、あなたは私に、行方不明の増援の行方について調べるように頼むでしょう」
languages.original_text: "And now you're going to ask me to find out what has become of the missing reinforcements."

traits.locale_text: 「そして今、あなたは私に、行方不明の増援の行方について調べるように頼むでしょう」
